business_profile.seasonal_demand_notes: Diwali and Ugadi are peak seasons. Monsoon months see a 15-20% drop in footfall.

sample_questions: Should I increase inventory before festival season?
What if rainfall is lower this season?
What if I take a loan of Rs 5 lakhs and open a second outlet?
Should I hire one more employee before the festive rush?
What happens to my business if demand drops by 25% next month?
